o¬†77

[...] men-me-dur-an-ki LUGAL : mu‚āÉ-tu-abzu ABGAL

o¬†88

[...] ina BALe mEN.ME.KAR‚āā LUGAL : mNUN.GAL.PIRIG‚āÉ.GAL ABGAL

[...] x x-MEŇ†-Ň°u‚āā na‚āĄZA.GIN‚āÉ.NA ina Ň°i-pir dNIN.A‚āā.GAL

its lapis lazuli [...]s with Ninagal's work

[...] x.KU‚āÉki Ň°u-bat DINGIR LU.U‚āĀ‚āą BALAG ina maŠłę-ri d60 u‚āā-kin-nu

[lu‚āā]‚łĘGALA‚ł£ d60 u an-tu‚āĄ UNUGki‚ÄĮu‚āā Ň†U NI‚āā-Ň°u‚āā

lamentation priest of Anu and Antu, Urukean. (Written with) his own hand.

r¬†88

[UNUG]ki itiGU‚āĄ U‚āĄ 10-KAM MU 1 ME 47-KAM man-ti- ĺi-i-ku-su ¬†; LUGAL

Uruk, the 10th day of Ayyaru (II), year 1 hundred 47, Antiochus was king.

r¬†99

pa-liŠłę d60 la‚āÉ ‚łĘTUM‚āÉ‚ł£-Ň°u‚āā

He who fears Anu shall not carry it off.
